Author: Sushii-dev (originally by grimgrum)
Name: Veiled Aim (BDO + ER)
Description:
Veiled Aim turns Final Fantasy XIV into the action game it always flirted with being.

Hide the cursor and the world snaps into focus. Your character faces where you look, the mouse turns the camera, and whatever sits in your sights becomes your target. Hold a modifier and scroll to lock and cycle through every enemy in range, a boss's weakpoints first. No clicking, no tab cycling. Just aim and act: the precision of a controller married to the speed of a keyboard.

Bind your skills to the mouse and they fire like native keys, queued and responsive, hold to repeat. One interact key carries the rest of the world: talk, loot, gather, ride pillion, roll on loot, focus a heal target, all without a menu, each marked by a soft glowing quest style cue.

It is not a tweak. It is a new way to hold the game. Combat that flows, exploration alive, your hands free to just play.

Fully configurable. Rebuilt from grimgrum's action camera for FFXIV.
